title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Groww - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Groww - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!
